headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Equifax, Lowers Price Target to $220
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Haas   maintains Equifax (NYSE:EFX) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $230 to $220.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Equifax, Lowers Price Target to $220
raw.summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Haas   maintains Equifax (NYSE:EFX) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $230 to $220.
